name: Control Plane
description: Task-ledger-first control-plane helpers for safer agent execution

storeDir.description: Relative or absolute path for control-plane state. Defaults to .openclaw-control-plane under the workspace.

defaultListLimit.description: Default limit used by task_ledger list when the caller does not provide one.

fileCheckpointingEnabled.description: Source-grounded alias from claw-code. When set, it becomes the default enable/disable switch for lifecycle checkpoint automation unless more specific automation settings override it.

enabled.description: Master switch for lifecycle automation hooks and review reminders.

checkpointOnReset.description: Automatically checkpoint active tasks before /new or /reset clears context.

checkpointOnCompaction.description: Automatically checkpoint active tasks before compaction.

checkpointOnFailure.description: Automatically checkpoint active tasks after failed/interrupted runs.

checkpointOnLongRun.description: Automatically checkpoint active tasks after long runs.

longRunMs.description: Run-duration threshold for automatic long-run checkpoints.

dedupeWindowMs.description: Skip repeating the same automatic checkpoint summary within this time window.

agentScopedFallback.description: If no session-bound tasks match, allow automation to fall back to agent-scoped tasks.

enabled.description: Attach review reminder checkpoints to tasks when structured outputs indicate follow-up.

activeStaleAfterMs.description: Default stale threshold for active tasks in the review queue.

blockedStaleAfterMs.description: Default stale threshold for blocked tasks in the review queue.

doneStaleAfterMs.description: Default stale threshold for done tasks when included in the review queue.

defaultListLimit.description: Default maximum number of review queue items to return.

enabled.description: Enable plan-mode tooling and prompt guidance hooks.

maxSteps.description: Maximum number of normalized plan steps to keep in a contract.

planningOnlyDefault.description: Default new plans to planning-only mode until explicitly exited or relaxed.

injectPromptContext.description: Inject active plan guidance into before_prompt_build for the current session.

defaultEvidenceLimit.description: Default number of recent evidence items to include in generated handoff packs.

defaultCheckpointLimit.description: Default number of recent checkpoints to include in generated handoff packs.

defaultStepLimit.description: Default number of plan steps to include in generated handoff packs.

activeStaleAfterMs.description: Default stale threshold for active tasks in drift detection.

blockedStaleAfterMs.description: Default stale threshold for blocked tasks in drift detection.

doneStaleAfterMs.description: Default stale threshold for done tasks when drift monitor includes them.

missingEvidenceAfterMs.description: Minimum task age before missing evidence becomes a drift finding.

pressureWindowMs.description: Lookback window for reset/compaction pressure signals.

repeatedBlockedCheckpointThreshold.description: Blocked-checkpoint count that marks repeated blocker drift.

compactionPressureCheckpointThreshold.description: Compaction auto-handoff count that marks compaction pressure.

resetPressureCheckpointThreshold.description: Reset auto-handoff count that marks reset pressure.

defaultListLimit.description: Default maximum number of drift items to return.

autoMemoryEnabled.description: Source-grounded alias from claw-code. Enables automatic capture of structured memory candidates from control-plane tool outputs.

autoDreamEnabled.description: Source-grounded alias from claw-code. Enables automatic dream distillation runs on supported lifecycle hooks.

autoMemoryEnabled.description: Enable automatic capture of structured memory candidates.

candidateRetentionDays.description: How many recent days of candidates to consider during distillation by default.

minScore.description: Minimum candidate score required for inclusion in a dream rollup.

distillLimit.description: Default maximum number of selected candidates in a dream rollup.

autoDreamOnCompaction.description: Run automatic dream distillation after compaction.

autoDreamOnSessionEnd.description: Reserved for future session-end dream distillation once workspace resolution is reliable across environments.
